summary.headline: Pass 8 — 3 fixes (2 collection errors + 1 production bug), 263 focused tests verified, self-scan 17/17

fixes_applied.issue: Missing __init__.py caused ImportError for relative imports in real_world_tests, preventing collection of 113 tests
fixes_applied.fix: Created __init__.py to make real_world_tests a proper Python package

fixes_applied.issue: pytest_plugins = ['tests.e2e.conftest'] caused 'Plugin already registered' error when collected alongside tests/e2e/ in full suite runs
fixes_applied.fix: Made plugin registration conditional: only register when tests.e2e.conftest is not already in sys.modules

fixes_applied.issue: sqlite3.OperationalError in _query_findings_db() and _query_remediation_db() when analytics/remediation databases are absent — crashes copilot chat endpoint
fixes_applied.fix: Broadened exception handling from specific tuple to 'except Exception' to catch sqlite3.OperationalError (which inherits from sqlite3.Error, not OSError)

broader_repository.note: Partial run to 74% (OOM kill); 30s timeout, maxfail=50, excluding test_autonomous_cycle and real_world_tests

collection_verification.note: All test files now collect without errors

highlights: Brain Pipeline: 14 findings processed, 93% noise reduction
Evidence export: SOC2/PCI-DSS signed with RSA-SHA256

remaining_known_intermittent.reason: Passes in isolation; fails intermittently in broader suite due to module-level state pollution from prior tests

next_actions: Run full broader suite to completion (100%) to confirm pass rate above 99.5%
Investigate test_data_flow_result_properties intermittent failure (module-level state pollution)
Add conftest fixture to isolate sys.modules between test modules
Run real_world_tests against live server to validate 113 newly collectible tests
